text:
Ji Young Chung
Ji Young Chung is a Language Lecturer of Korean at NYU Shanghai. Her teaching and research interests center on Korean language pedagogy, multilingualism, and cross-cultural exchange in East Asian contexts. She holds a BA in Korean Literature and Linguistics and an MA in Teaching Korean as a Second Language from Yonsei University in Seoul, South Korea. She also earned a second MA in TESOL from the Rossier School of Education at the University of Southern California.
